name: Creamy Gelatin Dessert
recipeIngredient: 4 large ripe bananas, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Stir in marshmallows until melted.
3. Add bananas.
4. Drain pineapple and reserve juice.
5. Mix reserved pineapple juice, gelatin mixture, and cold water together well.
6. Pour into a 13x9x2-inch pan and chill until set.
7. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and flour. Gradually stir in reserved pineapple juice.
8. Add butter; bring to a boil.
9. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature (about 35-40 minutes).
10. Whip the cream and fold into the pineapple juice mixture.
11. Spread over gelatin.
12. Sprinkle with nuts.
13. Chill for 1-2 hours.
